hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; } || true

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Direct commits to main are not allowed. Create a feat/* or fix/* branch first per CLAUDE.md."}'; fi
